eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 10:19 AM on JUL 10, 2019 Effective until 10:34 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Carson City authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Douglas County, Storey County and Lyon County.  This is only a test. No action required
